title: You Give Love a Bad Name
why_this_song: You Give Love a Bad Name by Bon Jovi (1986) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 21 times; first heard in: "Darlin', you give love a bad name"
Appears 19 times; first heard in: "Darlin', you give love a bad name"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I play my part and you play your game"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Shot through the heart and you're to blame"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Shot through the heart and you're to blame"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "name" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "name" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "give" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Shot through the heart and you're to blame
You give love a bad name

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "You Give Love a Bad Name" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "You Give Love a Bad Name" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "You Give Love a Bad Name", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "You Give Love a Bad Name", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "You Give Love a Bad Name" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "You Give Love a Bad Name" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
